case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BARNIEA, JOHN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BARNIEA, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNIEA, JOHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNIEA, JOHN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,070.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
